subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached before the Face of the Presence, and whatsoever was inscribed therein was observed. Praise be to God in all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات بین یدی الوجه فایز و آنچه در او مسطور مشاهده شد لله الحمد فی کل
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab
